'''鈭歬-f-ng''' ('''kafanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electropherotype|electropherotype]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electropherotype|electropherotype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-f-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kafanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafangithi|kafangithi]] || [[word:kafangiji|kafangiji]] || [[word:kafangishi|kafangishi]] || [[word:kafangi|kafangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafanguthuth|kafanguthuth]] || [[word:kafangujuj|kafangujuj]] || [[word:kafangushush|kafangushush]] || [[word:kafang|kafang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafanguthu|kafanguthu]] || [[word:kafanguju|kafanguju]] || [[word:kafangushu|kafangushu]] || [[word:kafangu|kafangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafangufuth|kafangufuth]] || [[word:kafangufuj|kafangufuj]] || [[word:kafangufush|kafangufush]] || [[word:kafanguf|kafanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafangethe|kafangethe]] || [[word:kafangeje|kafangeje]] || [[word:kafangeshe|kafangeshe]] || [[word:kafange|kafange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafangothoth|kafangothoth]] || [[word:kafangojoj|kafangojoj]] || [[word:kafangoshosh|kafangoshosh]] || [[word:kafang|kafang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafangotho|kafangotho]] || [[word:kafangojo|kafangojo]] || [[word:kafangosho|kafangosho]] || [[word:kafango|kafango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafangofoth|kafangofoth]] || [[word:kafangofoj|kafangofoj]] || [[word:kafangofosh|kafangofosh]] || [[word:kafangof|kafangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kafang忙th忙|kafang忙th忙]] || [[word:kafang忙j忙|kafang忙j忙]] || [[word:kafang忙sh忙|kafang忙sh忙]] || [[word:kafang忙|kafang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafangathath|kafangathath]] || [[word:kafangajaj|kafangajaj]] || [[word:kafangashash|kafangashash]] || [[word:kafang|kafang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafangatha|kafangatha]] || [[word:kafangaja|kafangaja]] || [[word:kafangasha|kafangasha]] || [[word:kafanga|kafanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafangafath|kafangafath]] || [[word:kafangafaj|kafangafaj]] || [[word:kafangafash|kafangafash]] || [[word:kafangaf|kafangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kafangasha|kafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokafangasha|gokafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikafangasha|gokikafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafangn眉sha|kafangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokafangnkn眉sha|gokafangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikafangn眉sha|gokikafangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafangsh毛sha|kafangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafangnksh毛sha|gokafangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafangsh毛sha|gokikafangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafangrosha|kafangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafangnkrosha|gokafangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafangrosha|gokikafangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kafangmusha|kafangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafangnkmusha|gokafangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafangmusha|gokikafangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kafangsherasha|kafangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokafangnksherasha|gokafangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikafangsherasha|gokikafangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kafangasha|kafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokafangnkngasha|gokafangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikafangasha|gokikafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kafangyasha|kafangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokafangnkyasha|gokafangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikafangyasha|gokikafangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kafangyamasha|kafangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokafangnkyamasha|gokafangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikafangyamasha|gokikafangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafangn眉sh毛sha|kafangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafangnkn眉sh毛sha|gokafangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafangn眉sh毛sha|gokikafangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafangn眉rosha|kafangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafangnkn眉rosha|gokafangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafangn眉rosha|gokikafangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafangn眉musha|kafangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafangnkn眉musha|gokafangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafangn眉musha|gokikafangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafangsh毛n眉sha|kafangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafangnksh毛n眉sha|gokafangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafangsh毛n眉sha|gokikafangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafangsh毛rosha|kafangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafangnksh毛rosha|gokafangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafangsh毛rosha|gokikafangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafangsh毛musha|kafangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafangnksh毛musha|gokafangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafangsh毛musha|gokikafangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafangron眉sha|kafangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafangnkron眉sha|gokafangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafangron眉sha|gokikafangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafangrosh毛sha|kafangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafangnkrosh毛sha|gokafangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafangrosh毛sha|gokikafangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafangromusha|kafangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafangnkromusha|gokafangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafangromusha|gokikafangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kafangmun眉sha|kafangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokafangnkmun眉sha|gokafangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikafangmun眉sha|gokikafangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kafangmush毛sha|kafangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokafangnkmush毛sha|gokafangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikafangmush毛sha|gokikafangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kafangmurosha|kafangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokafangnkmurosha|gokafangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikafangmurosha|gokikafangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kafang|kafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:k忙f忙ng|k忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokafang|hokafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hok忙f忙ng|hok忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokafang|hohokafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohok忙f忙ng|hohok忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉kafang|n眉kafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉k忙f忙ng|n眉k忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉kafang|n眉n眉kafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉k忙f忙ng|n眉n眉k忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂kafang|n茂kafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂k忙f忙ng|n茂k忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂kafang|n茂n茂kafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂k忙f忙ng|n茂n茂k忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukafang|lukafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luk忙f忙ng|luk忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukafang|lulukafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluk忙f忙ng|luluk忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likafang|likafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lik忙f忙ng|lik忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikafang|lilikafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilik忙f忙ng|lilik忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokafang|kokafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kok忙f忙ng|kok忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokafang|kokokafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokok忙f忙ng|kokok忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekafang|kekafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kek忙f忙ng|kek忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekafang|kekekafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekek忙f忙ng|kekek忙f忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
